sections.title: Writing Task 1
sections.instructions: You should spend about 20 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: The plans below show a harbour in 2000 and how it looks today. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

sections.title: Writing Task 2
sections.instructions: You should spend about 40 minutes on this task.

prompt.text: The working week should be shorter and workers should have a longer weekend. Do you agree or disagree? Give reasons for your answer and include any relevant examples from your own knowledge or experience.
